changelog:
### 🤖 Reed AI Financial Advisor (Powered by Google Gemini)
- **Automatic Real-Time Financial Snapshot** — Automatically compiles and attaches a structured financial context snapshot (assets, pot balances, active debts, recurring subscriptions, 30-day cash flow, savings goals) to every chat request without requiring the user to type financial numbers.
- **Strict Financial Scope Guardrails** — Enforces system-level instructions ensuring Reed AI strictly answers personal finance, budgeting, spending habits, debt payoff, and purchase decision evaluations ("Should I buy X?"), politely declining off-topic questions.
- **Zero-Cost Bring Your Own Key (BYOK) Strategy** — Integrated Gemini API settings dialog allowing users to configure their free Google AI Studio API key stored locally on-device.
- **Interactive AI Chat UI** — Built a dark luxury chat screen with quick prompt chips, message bubbles, typing indicator, copy response action, and clean chat history management.
- **Quick Access Navigation** — Added direct AI Advisor launcher button in the main AppBar and dedicated tiles in the Settings Drawer.
